servers.name: user_provider
servers.description: User provider MCP server - manages user data and authentication

servers.name: data_access
servers.description: Data access MCP server - provides database and file system access

instructions.usage: Enable MCP servers by setting 'enabled': true and providing the correct URL
instructions.api_key: Add API key if your MCP server requires authentication
instructions.custom_servers: Add your own MCP servers by following the same structure
instructions.tool_naming: Tools will be prefixed with server name (e.g., user_provider_get_user)
instructions.tools_endpoint: MCP servers must implement /tools/list and /tools/execute endpoints
